name: Rice
description: Rice grows best in West Bengal, Uttar Pradesh, Punjab, Andhra Pradesh, Tamil Nadu. It prefers temperatures between 20.0-26.9°C, humidity 80.1-85.0%, pH 5.0-7.9, and rainfall 182.6-298.6 mm.
region: West Bengal, Uttar Pradesh, Punjab, Andhra Pradesh, Tamil Nadu

name: Maize
description: Maize grows best in Karnataka, Madhya Pradesh, Bihar, Uttar Pradesh. It prefers temperatures between 18.0-26.5°C, humidity 55.3-74.8%, pH 5.5-7.0, and rainfall 60.7-109.8 mm.
region: Karnataka, Madhya Pradesh, Bihar, Uttar Pradesh

name: Chickpea
description: Chickpea grows best in Madhya Pradesh, Rajasthan, Maharashtra, Uttar Pradesh. It prefers temperatures between 17.0-21.0°C, humidity 14.3-20.0%, pH 6.0-8.9, and rainfall 65.1-94.8 mm.
region: Madhya Pradesh, Rajasthan, Maharashtra, Uttar Pradesh

name: Kidneybeans
description: Kidneybeans grows best in Himachal Pradesh, Jammu & Kashmir, Uttarakhand. It prefers temperatures between 15.3-24.9°C, humidity 18.1-25.0%, pH 5.5-6.0, and rainfall 60.3-149.7 mm.

name: Pigeonpeas
description: Pigeonpeas grows best in Maharashtra, Karnataka, Telangana, Uttar Pradesh. It prefers temperatures between 18.3-37.0°C, humidity 30.4-69.7%, pH 4.5-7.4, and rainfall 90.1-198.8 mm.

name: Mothbeans
description: Mothbeans grows best in Rajasthan, Gujarat. It prefers temperatures between 24.0-32.0°C, humidity 40.0-65.0%, pH 3.5-9.9, and rainfall 30.9-74.4 mm.

name: Mungbean
description: Mungbean grows best in Rajasthan, Maharashtra, Andhra Pradesh. It prefers temperatures between 27.0-29.9°C, humidity 80.0-90.0%, pH 6.2-7.2, and rainfall 36.1-59.9 mm.

name: Blackgram
description: Blackgram grows best in Madhya Pradesh, Uttar Pradesh, Tamil Nadu. It prefers temperatures between 25.1-34.9°C, humidity 60.1-70.0%, pH 6.5-7.8, and rainfall 60.4-74.9 mm.
region: Madhya Pradesh, Uttar Pradesh, Tamil Nadu

name: Lentil
description: Lentil grows best in Uttar Pradesh, Madhya Pradesh, Bihar. It prefers temperatures between 18.1-29.9°C, humidity 60.1-69.9%, pH 5.9-7.8, and rainfall 35.0-54.9 mm.

name: Pomegranate
description: Pomegranate grows best in Maharashtra, Karnataka, Gujarat. It prefers temperatures between 18.1-25.0°C, humidity 85.1-95.0%, pH 5.6-7.2, and rainfall 102.5-112.5 mm.

name: Banana
description: Banana grows best in Tamil Nadu, Maharashtra, Gujarat, Andhra Pradesh. It prefers temperatures between 25.0-29.9°C, humidity 75.0-85.0%, pH 5.5-6.5, and rainfall 90.1-119.8 mm.
region: Tamil Nadu, Maharashtra, Gujarat, Andhra Pradesh

name: Mango
description: Mango grows best in Uttar Pradesh, Andhra Pradesh, Maharashtra, Bihar. It prefers temperatures between 27.0-36.0°C, humidity 45.0-55.0%, pH 4.5-7.0, and rainfall 89.3-100.8 mm.
region: Uttar Pradesh, Andhra Pradesh, Maharashtra, Bihar

name: Grapes
description: Grapes grows best in Maharashtra, Karnataka. It prefers temperatures between 8.8-41.9°C, humidity 80.0-84.0%, pH 5.5-6.5, and rainfall 65.0-74.9 mm.

name: Watermelon
description: Watermelon grows best in Uttar Pradesh, Karnataka, Punjab. It prefers temperatures between 24.0-27.0°C, humidity 80.0-90.0%, pH 6.0-7.0, and rainfall 40.1-59.8 mm.

name: Muskmelon
description: Muskmelon grows best in Punjab, Haryana, Uttar Pradesh. It prefers temperatures between 27.0-29.9°C, humidity 90.0-95.0%, pH 6.0-6.8, and rainfall 20.2-29.9 mm.

name: Apple
description: Apple grows best in Himachal Pradesh, Jammu & Kashmir, Uttarakhand. It prefers temperatures between 21.0-24.0°C, humidity 90.0-94.9%, pH 5.5-6.5, and rainfall 100.1-125.0 mm.

name: Orange
description: Orange grows best in Maharashtra, Punjab, Assam, Madhya Pradesh. It prefers temperatures between 10.0-34.9°C, humidity 90.0-95.0%, pH 6.0-8.0, and rainfall 100.2-119.7 mm.

name: Papaya
description: Papaya grows best in Andhra Pradesh, Gujarat, Maharashtra. It prefers temperatures between 23.0-43.7°C, humidity 90.0-94.9%, pH 6.5-7.0, and rainfall 40.4-248.9 mm.

name: Coconut
description: Coconut grows best in Kerala, Tamil Nadu, Karnataka. It prefers temperatures between 25.0-29.9°C, humidity 90.0-100.0%, pH 5.5-6.5, and rainfall 131.1-225.6 mm.

name: Cotton
description: Cotton grows best in Gujarat, Maharashtra, Telangana, Punjab. It prefers temperatures between 22.0-26.0°C, humidity 75.0-84.9%, pH 5.8-8.0, and rainfall 60.7-99.9 mm.

name: Jute
description: Jute grows best in West Bengal, Assam, Bihar. It prefers temperatures between 23.1-27.0°C, humidity 70.9-89.9%, pH 6.0-7.5, and rainfall 150.2-199.8 mm.

name: Coffee
description: Coffee grows best in Karnataka, Kerala, Tamil Nadu. It prefers temperatures between 23.1-27.9°C, humidity 50.0-69.9%, pH 6.0-7.5, and rainfall 115.2-199.5 mm.
